input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.2.5.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.2.5.2
            TITLE: all camera installations must be approved at technical inspection.

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.2.5.2: All camera installations must be approved at Technical Inspection.
VE.2.5.2 All camera installations must be approved at Technical Inspection.

final_answer: All camera installations must be approved at Technical Inspection.
